definition_section.heading: What is AI Behavioral Assessment?
paragraphs: AI behavioral assessment utilizes advanced algorithms to analyze children's behaviors and emotions, specifically focusing on childhood depression.
BehaviorIQ™ offers a streamlined, accurate approach to identify mental health needs early, ensuring timely intervention and support.
